channel.title: Julio Rodriguez on Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content in Julio Rodriguez on Emerald City Gear

item.title: Unfinished Business: The Seattle Mariners' 2026 Season Preview
item.description: The Mariners lost the ALCS in seven games last year. Now they're back — 50 years in, hungrier than ever, and opening at home Thursday against Cleveland. Here's what to expect.

item.title: Rangers Come to T-Mobile: Why This Weekend Series Matters More Than You Think
item.description: The Texas Rangers visit T-Mobile Park for a critical three-game AL West series April 17–19. Here's what's at stake, who to watch, and how to grab tickets.

item.title: Back Home and Hungry: Mariners Host Astros in Must-Watch 4-Game Series
item.description: The Mariners return to T-Mobile Park for a crucial 4-game home stand against the Houston Astros, April 10–13. Here's what to watch — and how to be there.

item.title: $95 Million Before a Single MLB At-Bat: The Mariners Just Bet Big on Colt Emerson
item.description: The Mariners signed top prospect Colt Emerson to a historic $95 million extension before he's even debuted. Here's why this deal should have Seattle fans absolutely buzzing.

item.title: Colt Emerson Just Signed the Most Historic Deal in Mariners History — and He Hasn't Even Debuted Yet
item.description: The Mariners locked up top prospect Colt Emerson to an 8-year, $95 million deal before his MLB debut — the largest pre-debut contract in baseball history. Here's what it means for Seattle's future.

item.title: Rough Start: Mariners Drop Opening Day, But the Series Isn't Over
item.description: The Mariners fell 6-4 to Cleveland on Opening Day, but there's still plenty to build on — and three more games against the Guardians this weekend before the Yankees roll into town.
